_doc: SFX (sound-effects) generation registry for the Wimba Music app (App 4 of the Creator Suite).
AI generation is SFX-ONLY — NO AI MUSIC (hard copyright constraint). Music is library-only (CC0).
Mirrors tts_registry.json: a cheapest-first failover `chain`; every step is COMMERCIAL-OK and rides
the FAL_API_KEY we already hold (no new provider key). The non-commercial `atlascloud/mmaudio-v2`
research weights are deliberately EXCLUDED — only the clean `fal-ai/mmaudio-v2` is listed.
PRICING: per-step rate normalized to USD. `usd_flat` = flat per-generation; `usd_per_s` = per second
(billed on the effective, max-capped duration). The GATE holds the CEILING across all steps so a
failover to a pricier step can never exceed the reservation; the DEBIT settles to the winner's real
cost (commit refunds the difference). Studio-consistent x1 markup.
STEP SHAPE: {provider:fal, slug, body:{templated}, response:fal_queue, max_duration, usd_flat|usd_per_s}.
$PROMPT -> the effect description, $DURATION -> requested seconds (numeric, max-capped per step).
Request shapes are DATA-DRIVEN so post-smoke tuning is a registry edit, not a code change.
FLAGS: verified=slug/price confirmed live (else conservative-high rate to protect margin + audit-flag).
